strategy.holdUntil: Hold while Azure/cloud and enterprise AI adoption remain intact.
strategy.addWhen: Add on pullback if Azure growth and AI monetization stay strong.
strategy.trimWhen: Trim if AI capex outruns monetization or valuation stretches.
strategy.exitWhen: Exit review if cloud growth decelerates materially.
strategy.invalidation: Enterprise cloud + AI advantage stops compounding.

strategy.holdUntil: Hold only while thesis/liquidity/downside are being verified.

strategy.holdUntil: Hold only while range thesis and COIN/BTC risk tone support bounce.
strategy.addWhen: Add-watch near lower range only with crypto confirmation.
strategy.trimWhen: Scale down into upper range unless breakout is confirmed.
strategy.exitWhen: Exit/reduce below invalidation; never average down below invalidation.
strategy.invalidation: Lower support breaks with COIN/BTC weakness.
strategy.review: Daily while held; time stop 2–5 trading days.

confirmation: BTC risk tone not breaking down
CONL reclaims stop/entry level with volume
